sections.location: The smoke detectors are located upstairs and downstairs above the door frames.
The water shut off is likely located at the end of the drive way near the curb.
The HVAC filter is located in the living room.
The electric meter is usually located around the exterior of the home.
Located on the wall on the main floor.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
